skill.name: nanobanana-ppt-skills
skill.description: AI-powered PPT generation with document analysis and styled images
skill.summary: AI-powered PPT generation with document analysis and styled images
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation-only file (SKILL.md) containing metadata and guidance for AI-powered PPT generation. Static findings flagged as 'Hardcoded URL' and 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' are false positives - the URLs are repository references in metadata, and no cryptographic algorithms exist in this file. No executable code is present. This skill is safe for publication.

high_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Detection
high_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at SKILL.md:3 and SKILL.md:20. Upon review, these are FALSE POSITIVES - line 3 contains 'description:' and line 20 contains 'guidance' (substring 'guid'). No cryptographic code exists in this file.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual inspection confirms no cryptographic algorithms present - only documentation text

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URL References
low_findings.description: Static scanner detected URLs at SKILL.md:4 and SKILL.md:22. These are legitimate repository reference links in documentation metadata and content, not network code making external requests.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs are static references to source repository in frontmatter and markdown, not executable network calls

content.value_statement: This skill enables AI-powered PowerPoint generation with document analysis capabilities and styled image integration. Users can create professional presentations efficiently using AI assistance.
actual_capabilities: Provide PPT creation patterns and guidance
Support slide layout and design suggestions
limitations: Skill provides guidance patterns only, not direct PPT file generation
Requires external AI model integration for actual generation
Implementation depends on user's AI setup

use_cases.title: Business Presentation Creation
use_cases.description: Generate professional business presentations using AI analysis of source documents
use_cases.target_user: Business professionals needing quick presentation creation

use_cases.title: Educational Content Development
use_cases.description: Create educational slides from research documents and notes
use_cases.target_user: Teachers and educators preparing course materials

use_cases.title: Report Visualization
use_cases.description: Transform data reports into visual presentations

prompt_templates.title: Basic PPT Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a PowerPoint presentation about [TOPIC] with [NUMBER] slides

prompt_templates.title: Document-Based Slides
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this document and create a presentation with key points: [PASTE DOCUMENT]

prompt_templates.title: Styled Image Integration
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a presentation about [TOPIC] and include styled images for each slide

prompt_templates.title: Complete Presentation Package
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a professional presentation including structure, content, and design suggestions for [TOPIC]

output_examples.input: Create a 5-slide presentation about machine learning basics
output_examples.output:
Slide 1: Title - Introduction to Machine Learning
Slide 2: What is Machine Learning?
Slide 3: Types of ML (Supervised, Unsupervised, Reinforcement)
Slide 4: Common Applications
Slide 5: Getting Started

output_examples.input: Turn this report into slides: [summary of quarterly sales]
output_examples.output:
Slide 1: Q3 Sales Summary - Title
Slide 2: Revenue Overview - $2.5M total
Slide 3: Top Performing Products
Slide 4: Regional Performance
Slide 5: Recommendations

best_practices: Provide clear topic descriptions when requesting presentations
Specify the number of slides needed for appropriate depth
Include any specific design preferences or branding requirements
Use document analysis for converting existing content into slides
anti_patterns: Avoid vague requests like 'make a presentation' without context
Do not expect the skill to directly generate .pptx files
Avoid requesting extremely long presentations in a single prompt
Do not skip providing source material for document-based requests

faq.question: Can this skill directly create PowerPoint files?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides guidance and patterns for AI-powered PPT generation. Actual file creation requires integration with PPT generation tools.

faq.question: What AI tools work with this skill?
faq.answer: This skill supports Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for generating presentation content and structure.

faq.question: How do I create styled images for slides?
faq.answer: Use the skill's guidance to prompt AI models to generate image descriptions that can be used with image generation tools.

faq.question: Can I convert existing documents to presentations?
faq.answer: Yes, provide the document content to the AI with the document analysis prompt template.

faq.question: What types of presentations work best?
faq.answer: Business reports, educational content, technical summaries, and overview presentations work well with AI generation.

faq.question: Do I need programming knowledge to use this skill?
faq.answer: No, the skill provides natural language prompts that any user can employ for presentation creation.
